name: Dutch Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, cinnamon, baking soda, and salt.
3. In another bowl, whisk together the sugar, oil, eggs, vanilla extract, and rum extract until well combined.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until just combined.
5. Fold in the chopped walnuts and finely chopped raw apple.
6. Grease a 9x13 inch (23x33 cm) baking pan with cooking spray or butter.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake for 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
9. Frost with a cream cheese frosting or powdered sugar glaze, if desired. Serve warm or at room temperature.
